message:
feat(core): add graph_scoring with PageRank and betweenness centrality

Implements iterative PageRank (power method with dangling-node handling)
and Brandes betweenness centrality, generic over GraphView trait.
Includes AdjGraph for lightweight use and normalization helper.
35 unit tests covering chains, stars, cycles, complete graphs,
disconnected components, and edge cases.

Closes ft-3xoq9.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
